subject: chore(cleanup): delete legacy supabase/ folder; route ErrorBoundary through debugLog
body:
The supabase/ directory had no runtime dependencies — zero supabase.from
/ supabase.rpc calls in src/, no imports, no npm scripts. Schema and
migrations are owned by the tool-till-tees backend repo. Deleted the
13 files (config.toml, 10 migrations, one edge function, one seed file),
dropped supabase/.temp/ from .gitignore, removed the "remove supabase/"
TODO line, and trimmed CLAUDE.md's Architecture tree.

ErrorBoundary.componentDidCatch previously only logged to the console
in dev and no-op'd in production. Now routes every caught error through
debugLog('render', 'error', ...) so it lands in the in-app DebugPill
buffer in both environments. Users can export via the pill's Copy
button; a remote reporter can be wired later by subscribing to
debugLog. Removed the aspirational "// send to Sentry" comment.

SESSION_NOTES.md updated to reflect the deletion.

Tags: cleanup, supabase, error-reporting, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
title: delete legacy supabase/ folder; route ErrorBoundary through debugLog
